results.label: ministr
results.result_text: All 16 tests pass. The fix was a one-character change on `stats.py:50`: divided by `len(values) - 1` instead of `len(values)` to apply Bessel's correction in `sample_variance`.

results.label: grep
results.allowed_tools: Read Edit Write Bash Grep Glob
results.result_text: All 16 tests pass. The fix was on line 50 of `minicsv/stats.py`: changed the divisor in `sample_variance` from `len(values)` (population estimator) to `len(values) - 1` (Bessel's correction for unbiased sample variance).
